scripts.build: esbuild src/docmostly-crdt-runtime.js --bundle --format=iife --target=es2020 --banner:js='if (typeof globalThis.crypto === "undefined") { globalThis.crypto = { getRandomValues(values) { for (let index = 0; index < values.length; index += 1) values[index] = Math.floor(Math.random() * 256); return values; } }; }' --legal-comments=eof --outfile=../../docmostly/DocmostlyCRDTRuntime.js
